Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of Sheung Yuet Road (Wai Yip Street bound) near Wang Chiu Road is closed to all traffic.

2024-02-26T11:37:00.CONTENT_CN:

Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of Sheung Yuet Road (Wai Yip Street bound) near Wang Chiu Road is closed to all traffic.

At the same time, vehicles cannot make left turning from Sheung Yuet Road (Wai Yip Street bound) onto Wang Chiu Road.   Affected KMB bus routes nos. 74A and 24 (special departure) have been diverted.
